required_before_default: ComfyUI object_info shows Flux2 loader/sampler nodes
Flux2 Dev and/or Klein model assets registered with hash and path
base image workflow template exported to API format
single prompt smoke output passes decode and composition QA
reference workflow output passes identity/reference QA if used
fallback routing is tested when Flux2 fails
not_allowed_until_proven: using Flux2 LoRAs from unverified Flux1/SDXL assets
directly mixing Flux2 latent/model objects with SDXL/Pony/SD1.5
promoting Flux2 from docs or template presence alone
